title: Codebase Extraction Output
description: Raw symbol extraction from go/ast parsing (Go) or tree-sitter (future languages). One file per source module.

module.description: Module path relative to project root (e.g., 'cmd/goyoke-validate', 'internal/routing')

language.description: Primary language detected in this module

imports.description: Aggregate import graph for the module

stdlib.description: Imports from the language standard library

extractor_version.description: Version of goyoke-codebase-extract that produced this

path.description: File path relative to project root

error_count.description: Number of parse errors found in this file. 0 means clean parse.

line.description: Line number of the error node

message.description: Description of the parse error context

parse_errors.description: Parse errors found during extraction (go/parser errors for Go, tree-sitter ERROR nodes for other languages). Non-empty means extraction may be incomplete for this file.

name.description: Symbol name (function name, type name, etc.)

signature.description: Full signature as it appears in source (e.g., 'func validateTask(event *HookEvent) (*Response, error)')

params.description: Parameter list with names and types

receiver.description: Method receiver type (Go, R S4). Null for plain functions.

exported.description: Whether symbol is exported/public. Language-specific: Go=uppercase, Python=no underscore prefix, TS=export keyword, R=always true

calls.description: Functions/methods this symbol calls (populated by CM-007)

called_by.description: Functions/methods that call this symbol (populated by CM-007)
